bright_policy: global audio target is crisp, bright, and pleasant: prefer short clear attack, simultaneous chord accents, glass/pluck/card/tile/bubble/cute cues, light sparkle, and no arpeggio ladders, long air hiss, or dull lowpass impact
mahjong_policy: mahjong uses soft table-object sounds only: cardPlace/cardSlide/chipLay/chipsStack/chipsHandle; high-frequency events forbid chipsCollide/diceThrow/dieThrow/dieShuffle
nature_policy: water themes use bubble/splash/water/rain and forbid slime for regular feedback; pet/forest/jurassic use cute/bug/ooh/nose-style soft cues and forbid misc/bark/barking/howl/monster/roar/scream/hurt/cough/burp/snore/breath/burble/spit/poof/pfft/fart/deflate/balloon
magic_policy: fairy, fantasy, and magic themes use kenney-interface pluck/glass/select/drop tones only; forbid confirmation/open arpeggio cues, creature, barking, cute pet, monster, howl, roar, and long air hiss sources
dark_policy: dark themes keep tension with tactile card/chip/object sounds and brighter minor upward motion; no low closing stingers or hoarse creature sounds for high-frequency feedback
